name: Security State Bank
description_short: Pearsall, TX's Security State Bank branch is located at 1000 N Oak St, serving the local community with banking services.
description_long:
Security State Bank's Pearsall, TX branch sits at 1000 N Oak St as a standalone facility in this rural South Texas town. The branch provides local residents direct access to banking services without having to travel to neighboring cities. Banking hours are not published online, so calling ahead is recommended for weekend or evening visits.

At the Pearsall location, customers can handle deposits, withdrawals, account management, and other standard banking needs in person. Contact the branch directly for specific information about loan products, credit services, or specialized offerings available at this Pearsall office.

For Pearsall residents, visiting the 1000 N Oak St branch requires a valid photo ID, and bringing account statements or documentation relevant to your banking needs will streamline the process. Security State Bank provides the convenience of a local banking presence, eliminating long drives to handle your financial matters.
pros: Established 1925 with nearly 100 years of institutional history and community presence in South Texas
Multiple checking account options (Basic, Regular, Super Now) allowing customers to match account type to usage patterns
Dedicated 24/7 after-hours debit card support line (800-500-1044) for emergency card issues
Active fraud prevention program including customer security training and education resources
Community involvement documented through charitable partnerships and local food bank donations
Mobile app available on both iOS and Android platforms for digital banking access
Personal and business lending options including agricultural loans for regional customer base
cons: Interest rates on savings and deposit products not published online—requires phone contact for current rates
Limited to South Texas geographic region with no indication of national branch network or ATM partnerships
Minimal digital transparency: loan terms, fees, and product details not comprehensively listed online
No mention of FDIC insurance, deposit limits, or standard banking disclosures on website
No documented online account opening process; website directs customers to call or visit branches
best_for: South Texas residents seeking community banking with personal relationships and local decision-making
Agricultural and small business owners needing specialized lending familiar with rural Texas economies
Customers prioritizing fraud prevention and security education over digital banking convenience
Long-term customers valuing institutional stability and century-old bank heritage
diagnosis: Security State Bank is best suited for South Texas-based consumers and business owners who value established community banking relationships, personalized service, and proximity to physical branches over digital-first convenience. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to South Texas and lack of online rate transparency, requiring direct phone contact to compare products with competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Pearsall, TX — Security State Bank at 1000 N Oak St. Local banking services for deposits, withdrawals & accounts.
